messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0118",
  "title": "“放置为表、MMO为里”，并通过IP联动将两者紧密藕合",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## “放置为表、MMO为里”，并通过IP联动将两者紧密藕合

《杖剑传说》在表层体验上，采用竖屏设计，主打“睡觉也能变强”的经典放置逻辑，以及探索地图、触发随机事件的轻度解谜玩法，极大降低了日常参与门槛。其核心的深层体验在于将MMORPG内核巧妙的编织进放置玩法的框架中。首先，游戏构建了一套深度策略性的战斗与养成体系。战斗采用半即时指令队列，玩家需要预先搭配8个主动与被动技能，策略核心在于技能组合与装备词条的BD构建，数百个技能形成的组合搭配从根源上保证了玩法的长期可探索性。其次，游戏保留了MMO的核心社交驱动。虽然个人放置挂机完全独立，但高收益的副本挑战鼓励甚至依赖玩家组队进行。游戏中“大佬带本”文化普遍，结合公会系统，成功复刻了传统MMO中基于协作的社交乐趣与归属感，这是保障留存与流水的关键所在。另一方面值得注意的是，《杖剑传说》在上线之后保持了高频的IP联动，平均每2个月便有一次新的联动活动上线，且这些IP都更偏向于核心二次元受众。同时得益于游戏纯2D的小清新美术风格在与二次元IP结合时拥有高适配性和低违和感，使得联动内容能快速落地并有效转化IP粉丝。

《杖剑传说》公测仅半年多就已实装了多个联动活动

杖剑传说 \(\times\) 蔬菜精灵

公测同步开启联动

来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制

杖剑传说 \(\mathsf{x}\) 为美好的世界献上祝福

公测2个月后

杖剑传说×洛天依×言和

公测4个月后

杖剑传说 x 罗小黑战记2

公测6个月后

message.content:
This section outlines the design framework and post-launch operational strategy of the game 《杖剑传说》, enabling retrieval for queries regarding:
- **Topics & Core Concepts:** The “放置为表、MMO为里” (idle surface, MMO core) design philosophy; integration of vertical idle mechanics with MMORPG depth; IP collaboration strategy targeting core ACG audiences.
- **Entities:** Game: 《杖剑传说》; Collaborated IPs: 蔬菜精灵, 为美好的世界献上祝福, 洛天依, 言和, 罗小黑战记2; Data Source: 点点数据.
- **Dates & Timelines:** Collaboration frequency (~every 2 months); specific rollout milestones: launch (同步), 2 months, 4 months, and 6 months post-public beta (公测).
- **Definitions & Mechanics:** “半即时指令队列” (semi-real-time command queue); “BD构建” (build/strategy construction via skill combos & equipment affixes); “大佬带本”文化 (veteran-led dungeon grouping); pure 2D fresh art style.
- **Procedures & Systems:** Pre-configuring 8 active/passive skills; forming skill/equipment synergies; solo idle progression vs. team-dependent high-yield dungeons; guild-based social engagement.
- **Claims:** The hybrid model significantly lowers daily participation barriers while ensuring long-term playability through hundreds of skill combinations; MMO-style social collaboration and guilds are critical drivers for player retention and revenue; the 2D art style enables high compatibility with ACG IPs, facilitating rapid content deployment and effective fan conversion.
- **Figures/Tables & Metrics:** A timeline figure/chart documenting four major IP collaborations within the first six months post-launch; metrics include ~2-month collaboration intervals, 8-skill loadout capacity, and hundreds of total available skills.
- **Evidence Types:** Gameplay system analysis, operational timeline data, and third-party market research (点点数据自主研究及绘制).

     - Section Text: Describes the game 《杖剑传说》 (Legend of the Sword/Staff?). Key points:
       - Surface: Vertical screen, idle/incremental gameplay ("get stronger while sleeping"), light puzzle/exploration, low barrier to entry.
       - Core/Deep: MMORPG mechanics woven into idle framework.
       - Combat/Progression: Semi-real-time command queue, 8 active/passive skills, strategy focuses on skill combos & equipment affixes (BD/builds), hundreds of skills ensure long-term exploration.
       - Social: MMO social drive retained. Idle is solo, but high-yield dungeons encourage/require grouping. "Veterans carry newbies" culture, guild system, replicates traditional MMO collaboration/social belonging, key for retention & revenue.
       - IP Collaborations: High frequency post-launch (~every 2 months), targets core ACG (2D/anime) audience. Pure 2D fresh art style fits well with ACG IPs, enabling fast implementation & effective fan conversion.
       - Figure/Table: Lists collaborations with timelines:
         - 公测同步开启联动 (Launch): 杖剑传说 × 蔬菜精灵 (Vegetable Spirit)
         - 公测2个月后 (2 months post-launch): 杖剑传说 × 为美好的世界献上祝福 (KonoSuba)
         - 公测4个月后 (4 months post-launch): 杖剑传说 × 洛天依 × 言和 (Luo Tianyi & Yanhe)
         - 公测6个月后 (6 months post-launch): 杖剑传说 × 罗小黑战记2 (The Legend of Hei 2)
         - Source: 点点数据自主研究及绘制 (Diandian Data)
         - Caption: 《杖剑传说》公测仅半年多就已实装了多个联动活动

2.  **Identify Key Retrieval Dimensions (Questions it can answer):**

   - *Entities:* 《杖剑传说》 (Game), 蔬菜精灵, 为美好的世界献上祝福, 洛天依, 言和, 罗小黑战记2 (IPs), 点点数据 (Data source).
   - *Dates/Timelines:* Launch (公测同步), 2 months post-launch, 4 months post-launch, 6 months post-launch, ~every 2 months frequency.
   - *Definitions/Concepts:* “放置为表、MMO为里” (Idle as surface, MMO as core), BD构建 (Build/Strategy construction), 半即时指令队列 (Semi-real-time command queue), “大佬带本”文化 (Veteran-carry culture).
   - *Procedures/Mechanics:* Pre-matching 8 skills, skill combo & equipment affix strategy, grouping for high-yield dungeons, guild participation.
   - *Claims:* Lowers daily participation barrier; ensures long-term playability via hundreds of skill combos; social collaboration & guilds are key to retention & revenue; 2D art style enables high compatibility & low dissonance with ACG IPs for fast conversion.
   - *Tables/Figures:* Timeline/chart of IP collaborations post-launch (0, 2, 4, 6 months).
   - *Metrics:* ~2 months per collaboration frequency; 8 skills per loadout; hundreds of skills total; half-year post-launch timeframe.
   - *Evidence Types:* Game feature analysis, collaboration timeline data, source attribution (Diandian Data research).

3.  **Draft Summary (Mental Refinement - focusing on retrieval orientation):**
   This section details the design philosophy and operational strategy of the game 《杖剑传说》. It answers questions regarding:
   - **Core Gameplay & Mechanics:** How the game combines vertical idle/incremental mechanics with MMORPG depth, including its semi-real-time command queue combat, 8-skill loadout system, equipment affix BD (build) strategy, and hundreds of skill combinations for long-term engagement.
   - **Social & Retention Systems:** How it maintains MMO social drivers through group-dependent high-yield dungeons, guild systems, and a "veteran-carry" culture to boost retention and revenue.
   - **IP Collaboration Strategy:** The frequency (~every 2 months), target audience (core ACG fans), and execution advantages (pure 2D art style ensuring high compatibility and fast fan conversion).
   - **Specific Collaborations & Timeline:** A chronological list of post-launch IP partnerships: 蔬菜精灵 (launch), 为美好的世界献上祝福 (2 months), 洛天依×言和 (4 months), and 罗小黑战记2 (6 months), sourced from Diandian Data.
   - **Key Claims & Evidence:** Assertions that the "idle surface, MMO core" model lowers entry barriers while preserving depth, and that frequent, well-matched IP联动 drives effective user conversion, supported by a timeline figure and third-party data research.

response_text:
This section outlines the design framework and post-launch operational strategy of the game 《杖剑传说》, enabling retrieval for queries regarding:
- **Topics & Core Concepts:** The “放置为表、MMO为里” (idle surface, MMO core) design philosophy; integration of vertical idle mechanics with MMORPG depth; IP collaboration strategy targeting core ACG audiences.
- **Entities:** Game: 《杖剑传说》; Collaborated IPs: 蔬菜精灵, 为美好的世界献上祝福, 洛天依, 言和, 罗小黑战记2; Data Source: 点点数据.
- **Dates & Timelines:** Collaboration frequency (~every 2 months); specific rollout milestones: launch (同步), 2 months, 4 months, and 6 months post-public beta (公测).
- **Definitions & Mechanics:** “半即时指令队列” (semi-real-time command queue); “BD构建” (build/strategy construction via skill combos & equipment affixes); “大佬带本”文化 (veteran-led dungeon grouping); pure 2D fresh art style.
- **Procedures & Systems:** Pre-configuring 8 active/passive skills; forming skill/equipment synergies; solo idle progression vs. team-dependent high-yield dungeons; guild-based social engagement.
- **Claims:** The hybrid model significantly lowers daily participation barriers while ensuring long-term playability through hundreds of skill combinations; MMO-style social collaboration and guilds are critical drivers for player retention and revenue; the 2D art style enables high compatibility with ACG IPs, facilitating rapid content deployment and effective fan conversion.
- **Figures/Tables & Metrics:** A timeline figure/chart documenting four major IP collaborations within the first six months post-launch; metrics include ~2-month collaboration intervals, 8-skill loadout capacity, and hundreds of total available skills.
- **Evidence Types:** Gameplay system analysis, operational timeline data, and third-party market research (点点数据自主研究及绘制).
